content.text:
[cron:15028631-f68e-464d-980d-b71e15ab1c1a version save] run a sync to GitHub to save version history of this OpenClaw and all other programs and files
Current time: Saturday, May 9th, 2026 - 4:30 AM (America/Chicago) / 2026-05-09 09:30 UTC

Use the message tool if you need to notify the user directly with an explicit target. If you do not send directly, your final plain-text reply will be delivered automatically.
I'll run a sync to GitHub to save version history. Let me first check the current state of the workspace and any existing git setup.

arguments.command: cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw/workspace && git status && echo "---REMOTES---" && git remote -v && echo "---BRANCH---" && git branch -a
cd /Users/landonking/.openclaw && git status 2>/dev/null || echo "NO GIT REPO"
